description: As a structural BIM detailer, create a reinforced concrete column detail in a new IFC4 project using BlenderBIM/Bonsai. The model must include at least one IfcColumn and at least six IfcReinforcingBar elements embedded within it (e.g., four vertical bars and two horizontal ties). Assign a material containing 'Concrete' in its name to the column and a material containing 'Steel' or 'Rebar' in its name to the reinforcing bars. Save the project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/column_reinforcement.ifc.
